title: Spooks Run Wild
writer: Carl Foreman, Charles R. Marion, Jack Henley
actors: Bela Lugosi, Leo Gorcey, Bobby Jordan
plot: The boys are stranded in a small rural town, they hear about a "monster killer" roaming the countryside. At night, they sneak out. Peewee is shot by a grave-digger, and they are forced to seek aid at an old mansion.
